description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: linux-wheels-x86-64, mac-wheels-x86-64, and win-wheels. Each job installs Python 3.9, cibuildwheel, and builds wheels for Python 3.7-3.9 using cibuildwheel. The linux and macos jobs use a matrix strategy to build for x86_64 architecture, while the windows job uses the windows-latest environment. Upload the built wheels as artifacts if the workflow is triggered on the master branch.
